---
title: "Tao Han"
subtitle: "Postdoctoral Researcher"
image: /images/portraits/tao-han.jpg
role: postdoc
weight: 2
aliases: ["Tao Han", "T. Han", "T Han"]
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:th596@cornell.edu"
    - icon: record-circle
      text: ORCID
      href: "https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9164-284X"
---

I am interested in using advanced computer vision techniques and terrestrial laser
scanning to understand different ecological processes.
